stage3.title: Framework

stage4.answer1: Personalized workouts you can finish in 10 minutes
stage4.answer2: Instagram, TikTok, and fitness creator partnerships
stage4.answer3: $10k per month for the first quarter

stage5.promptIntro: Create a marketing strategy for a new fitness app. Include:

stage5.promptEtc: Provide channels, messaging, and a 90-day action plan.

visitorLimitModal.title: Create an account to continue

hero.title: The Simple Way to Solve
hero.subtitle: Great AI results start with great questions. BettrPrompt asks the right ones - then builds structured prompts that actually work.

feature1.title: The Right Approach, Automatically
feature1.description: We analyze your task and choose from 60+ proven methodologies. You get effective prompts without needing to become a prompt engineer.

feature2.title: Questions You Haven't Thought Of
feature2.description: Not sure where to start? We surface what you actually need - so you get useful answers on the first try, not after three rounds of back-and-forth.

feature3.title: Adapted to How You Think
feature3.description: Add your personality type and we'll tailor our questions accordingly. An analytical thinker and a creative thinker working on the same problem need different starting points - we'll show you why we're asking what we're asking.

comparison.title: But Can't I Just Ask ChatGPT?
comparison.subtitle: You can. ChatGPT might even ask a clarifying question or two. But there's a difference between being helpful quickly and drawing out what you actually need.

chatgpt.title: Asking ChatGPT directly
chatgpt.yourPrompt: I need to write a best man speech for my friend's wedding
chatgpt.label: ChatGPT:
chatgpt.response: Generates a speech immediately, or asks one or two quick questions before diving in. It's trying to help you fast.
chatgpt.result: A generic speech that sounds like every other best man speech. You spend the next hour tweaking it to sound like you.
chatgpt.footer: You get what you asked for

bettrprompt.title: Using BettrPrompt
bettrprompt.yourPrompt: I need to write a best man speech for my friend's wedding
bettrprompt.label: BettrPrompt:
bettrprompt.response: Selects a framework for memorable personal storytelling. Then asks: "How did you two meet? What's a story that captures who he really is? What's the couple's sense of humor? Who's in the audience?"
bettrprompt.result: A prompt that captures your friendship, fits the audience, and plays to your strengths - so the AI output actually sounds like something you'd say.
bettrprompt.footer: You get what AI is actually capable of

comparison.keyInsight: ChatGPT answers what you ask. {0} - then builds a prompt that gets you AI's best work, not its first guess.
comparison.keyInsightEmphasis: BettrPrompt uncovers what you should have asked

templates.title: What About Prompt Templates?
templates.description: Templates are one-size-fits-all. We generate prompts for your specific situation through dialogue - your context, your constraints, your voice. No two prompts are the same.

learning.title: Should I Learn Prompt Engineering?
learning.description: You could. But you're busy. BettrPrompt embeds dozens of proven frameworks so you don't have to memorize them. Describe what you need - we'll handle the rest.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to better AI prompts

step1.title: Describe Your Challenge
step1.description: What do you want to achieve? Planning a project? Making a decision? Solving a problem? Describe your goal in plain language.

step2.title: Answer a Few Questions
step2.description: We structure your thinking - asking the questions that surface what you actually need, not what you think you need. This is where vague becomes specific.

step3.title: Get Your Optimized Prompt
step3.description: Copy your prompt into ChatGPT, Claude, or any AI tool. It's built for results and shaped by your answers - not a generic template.

useCases.title: When to Use BettrPrompt
useCases.subtitle: If you can describe what you're trying to achieve, we'll help you get there.

workCareer.title: Work & Career
workCareer.subtitle: Navigate the conversations and decisions that shape your professional life.
bullets: Asking your manager for a promotion
Preparing for a difficult performance review
Delegating a complex project to your team
Writing a proposal that convinces skeptical stakeholders

personalDecisions.title: Personal Decisions
personalDecisions.subtitle: Bring clarity to the choices that matter most.
bullets: Deciding whether to accept a job offer or stay put
Working through a major life change with your partner
Setting boundaries with someone who's draining you
Planning a difficult conversation with aging parents

learningDevelopment.title: Learning & Development
learningDevelopment.subtitle: Build skills and habits in a way that works for how you learn.
bullets: Creating a study plan for a professional qualification
Getting up to speed on a new industry quickly
Starting to learn a new language or skill from scratch
Building a sustainable reading or learning habit

creativeProjects.title: Creative Projects
creativeProjects.subtitle: Get unstuck and find your starting point.
bullets: Planning a novel, screenplay, or creative project
Writing a speech that's funny, heartfelt, or both
Creating content for a new business or side project
Designing a memorable event or celebration

businessStrategy.title: Business & Strategy
businessStrategy.subtitle: Think through high-stakes decisions with clarity.
bullets: Developing a marketing strategy for a new product
Analyzing whether to expand into a new market
Preparing for a board presentation or investor pitch
Improving team productivity or processes

relationshipsCommunication.title: Relationships & Communication
relationshipsCommunication.subtitle: Handle the human stuff with more confidence.
bullets: Resolving an ongoing conflict with your partner
Giving difficult feedback without damaging a relationship
Having a meaningful conversation with a teenager about their future
Reconnecting with a friend you've drifted apart from

example.title: Watch It Work
example.subtitle: A real example: creating a marketing strategy

hero.subtitle: BettrPrompt asks the right questions first - so your prompts actually work.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.paragraph1: You type something into ChatGPT. It's not quite right. You tweak, rephrase, try again. Three attempts later, you've got something usable - but no idea why this version worked.
problem.paragraph2: You're not doing anything wrong. AI just expects you to know exactly what you want before you've thought it through.

how.title: How BettrPrompt Works Differently

step1.title: We ask before we generate.
step1.description: Targeted questions help you clarify what you actually need - before we create anything.

step2.title: We select from 60+ proven frameworks.
step2.description: Intelligent selection based on your task, not guesswork.

step3.title: We adapt to how you think.
step3.description: Questions tailored to your personality, with transparency about why we're asking.

how.result: The result: a structured prompt ready to paste into ChatGPT or Claude - that actually works.

join.title: Join the Free Pilot
join.description: We're inviting a small group to test BettrPrompt before public launch. Your feedback will shape the product.

commitments.feedback: Submit brief feedback at the end

join.note: That's it. No cost. No obligation to continue.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that works for you
pricing.tagline: Start free, upgrade when you need more

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For power users who want the best results

limit.question: What happens when I reach my free limit?
limit.answer: Free accounts are limited to 10 prompts per month. Your limit resets on the first of each month. You can upgrade to Pro at any time for unlimited prompts.

privacy.question: What is privacy encryption?
privacy.answer: Pro users get their prompt data encrypted at rest. This means your prompts and responses are protected with encryption keys that only you control, ensuring maximum privacy for sensitive tasks.

cancel.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
cancel.answer: Yes, you can cancel anytime. You'll retain Pro access until the end of your current billing period, then you'll be moved to the Free plan.

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards, as well as Apple Pay and Google Pay through our secure payment provider, Stripe.

intro.title: We'd love to hear from you!
intro.description: Your feedback will help us decide whether to improve this project - or to abandon it! Please be honest.

show.title: Your feedback
show.heading: Your feedback
show.subtitle: You can update your responses at any time.

experience.label: 1. How experienced are you with AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude?

cancelConfirm.description: You will retain Pro access until the end of your current billing period. After that, you'll be moved to the Free plan with 10 prompts per month.

success.description: You now have unlimited prompts and privacy encryption. Start creating powerful, personality-calibrated prompts!

proRequired.title: Pro Feature
proRequired.description: Privacy encryption is available exclusively for Pro subscribers. Your prompt data and personal information will be encrypted at rest, ensuring only you can access your data.

status.title: Encryption Status
status.enabledDescription: Your prompt data is encrypted at rest. Only you can access your data by entering your password.
status.notEnabledDescription: Your data is stored without end-to-end encryption
status.enableDescription: Enable privacy encryption to protect your prompt data at rest. Once enabled, your data will be encrypted with a key derived from your password.

step1.title: Password-Protected Key
step1.description: A unique encryption key is generated and protected by your account password.

step2.title: Recovery Phrase
step2.description: You'll receive a 12-word recovery phrase that can restore access if you forget your password.

step3.title: Encrypted At Rest
step3.description: All your prompt data is encrypted before being stored. Without your password, the data is unreadable.

setup.title: Enable Privacy Encryption

savePhrase.title: Important: Save Your Recovery Phrase
savePhrase.description: Write down these 12 words in order. This is the {0} to recover your data if you forget your password. Store it securely and never share it.

setup.confirmWritten: I have written down my recovery phrase and stored it securely
setup.confirmDescription: Enter the words at the specified positions to confirm you've saved your recovery phrase.

recovery.title: Recover Your Data
recovery.description: Enter your 12-word recovery phrase to regain access to your encrypted data. You will also need to set a new password.

disable.title: Disable Privacy Encryption?
disable.description: This will decrypt all your stored data. Your prompts will no longer be encrypted at rest.
disable.confirmLabel: I understand my data will no longer be encrypted
